Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: The Wolowitzes' life gets complicated when Stuart starts bringing his new girlfriend home. Also, Penny and Leonard talk about starting a family while Koothrappali explores an arranged marriage.

Episodes.Title: The Tam Turbulence
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, David Goetsch
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Sheldon won't tell anyone why he's never mentioned Tam, his childhood best friend, so Leonard takes matters into his own hands. Also, Bernadette and Penny take out Raj's fiancée, Anu, for dinner to get the skinny on her.

Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Steve Holland
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Amy doesn't have time to work with Sheldon on super asymmetry, so he goes to great lengths to ensure she's available. Koothrappali doesn't want Wolowitz to join him in hosting a show at the planetarium.

Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Eric Kaplan
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: When Wolowitz dresses up as Sheldon for Halloween, Sheldon seeks retaliation at Leonard and Penny's Halloween party. Also, Leonard is shocked that Penny doesn't remember their first kiss.

Episodes.Title: The Grant Allocation Derivation
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Steve Holland
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Leonard is caught between a rock and a hard place when he's responsible for distributing extra grant money. Also, Bernadette turns the backyard playhouse into a hideaway from her husband and kids.

Episodes.Title: The Consummation Deviation
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Eric Kaplan
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Sheldon tries to bond with Amy's father, but when Wolowitz lures Mr. Fowler away with magic tricks, Sheldon has no choice but to bond with Mrs. Fowler. Also, Koothrappali and Anu try to get physical for the first time.

Episodes.Title: The Citation Negation
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Steve Holland
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Sheldon and Amy are devastated after learning from a Russian paper that super asymmetry has already been theorized and disproved. Bernadette wants to beat Howard in a popular video game.

Episodes.Title: The VCR Illumination
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Maria Ferrari
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: A VHS tape from Sheldon's past inspires him and Amy not to give up when they're still feeling down about their theory being disproven. Bernadette turns into a pageant mom when she tries to help Howard with his Magic Castle audition.

Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Penny and Leonard organize a paintball game, which results in mayhem when Sheldon becomes jealous of Amy. Raj catches Anu with her ex-boyfriend. Stuart doesn't want to move in with Denise.

Episodes.Title: The Propagation Proposition
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Maria Ferrari
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Penny's ex-boyfriend Zack learns that he is infertile, so he asks Leonard for help; Koothrappali attempts to mend things with his ex-fiancee Anu.

Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco

Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Sheldon is thrilled to help Bernadette and Howard navigate bureaucracy concerning a neighbor's non-compliant balcony until he learns they too have ignored codes. Leonard is disappointed when his friends are uninterested in his new...

Episodes.Title: The Donation Oscillation
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Steve Holland
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Penny tries to throw a wrench into Leonard's plan to be a sperm donor for her ex-boyfriend; Wolowitz, Bernadette, Anu and Koothrappali turn Koothrappali's canceled bachelor party into a couple's trip aboard the "vomit comet."

Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: The gang finds out Wil Wheaton hosts a celebrity Dungeons and Dragons game involving William Shatner, Joe Manganiello, Kareem Abdul-Jabbar and Kevin Smith. Deception and betrayal are the path to make it to the one open seat.

Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Steve Holland
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Bernadette and Penny travel to San Diego for a pharmaceutical sales convention. Back home, Amy and the guys experiment on the Wolowitz children when Sheldon finds a book on it.

Episodes.Title: The Decision Reverberation
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Eric Kaplan
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Koothrappali is worried people won't take him seriously in his own field after publishing a paper that suggests he may have discovered alien life. Leonard wants to be the principal investigator on a plasma physics study.

Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco

Episodes.Title: The Maternal Conclusion
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Maria Ferrari
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Leonard is pleasantly surprised when Beverly comes to visit and she's genuinely kind to him, until he finds out the real reason she's there. Also, Denise and Stuart overstay their welcome at the Wolowitz house.

Episodes.Title: The Change Constant
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Steve Holland
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Sheldon and Amy await big news.

Episodes.Title: The Stockholm Syndrome
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Steve Holland
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Bernadette and Wolowitz leave their kids for the first time; Penny and Leonard try to keep a secret; Sheldon and Amy stick together; and Koothrappali makes a new friend, as the gang travels together into an uncharted future.
